item.title: Use Git and GitHub on your projects like a professional
item.description: Learn how to use Git to version control your GitHub repositories using issue, pull request, branch.

item.title: VIRTUAL MACHINE KILLER? | WSL 2
item.description: Why should you use WSL2 for Linux on Windows? How will you install WSL2?
